target.title: Update ClawHub email templates
target.body:
## Summary
- Port ClawHub transactional emails to approved ClawHub template sources, with normalized footers and underlined footer links.
- Add a generic admin one-off email template plus staff CLI/API wiring for username, title, body, button text, and button link inputs.
- Preserve moderation semantics, including removing unsupported CTAs from review-failed-style notices and avoiding misleading partial counts for batched ban/unban emails.

## Proof
Rendered email template proof:

![Rendered email template proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openclaw/clawhub/305975f3ba1e7aefc95b486ad61be479daf1573c/proof/pr-2597/email-template-render-proof.png)

Generic one-off email proof:

![Generic one-off email proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openclaw/clawhub/305975f3ba1e7aefc95b486ad61be479daf1573c/proof/pr-2597/admin-one-off-email.png)

Plugin Inspector findings proof:

![Plugin Inspector findings email proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openclaw/clawhub/305975f3ba1e7aefc95b486ad61be479daf1573c/proof/pr-2597/plugin-inspector-findings.png)

CLI dry-run proof:

```bash
bun run packages/clawhub-mod/src/cli.ts --no-input email send --to user@example.com --username octocat --subject 'Content rights report' --title 'Action required: content rights report' --body 'We received a report about <package>. Please reply with context.' --button-text 'Open appeal' --button-link 'https://appeals.openclaw.ai/case-123' --json
```

Exit code: 0

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "dryRun": true,
  "template": "generic-one-off",
  "recipient": {
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "handle": "octocat"
  },
  "subject": "Content rights report",
  "title": "Action required: content rights report",
  "body": "We received a report about <package>. Please reply with context.",
  "primaryAction": {
    "label": "Open appeal",
    "url": "https://appeals.openclaw.ai/case-123"
  }
}
```

## Tests
- `bunx vitest run convex/lib/emails.test.ts convex/users.test.ts packages/clawhub-mod/src/commands/email.test.ts`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:packages`
- `bun run --cwd packages/schema build` after resolving the generated source-map conflict

## Review Notes
- Accepted and fixed autoreview findings around moderation count propagation and placeholder replacement safety.
- A final Codex autoreview rerun hung twice in `codex review --uncommitted`; fallback reviewers were unavailable locally (`claude`: low credits, `droid`: unauthenticated). The accepted findings from the completed review pass are fixed and covered by targeted tests.
target.author: patrick-erichsen
